headline: Teradyne Marks 25 Years In China With AI Test Push
summary: Teradyne (NasdaqGS:TER) is marking its 25th anniversary in China at SEMICON China 2026. The company is showcasing four test solutions focused on AI infrastructure and next-generation semiconductors. The anniversary highlights Teradyne's ongoing investment in local partnerships, engineering, and technology development. Teradyne operates at the core of semiconductor testing, an area closely tied to AI infrastructure and advanced chip design. With 25 years in China, the company has built a...
